title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS is a framework that equips AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures. It enables agents to deploy infrastructure like Lambda functions and API Gateways with improved success rates and includes guardrails, auditability via CloudTrail, and team rollout capabilities.
